properties.Name: Te Rāwhiti Exotic Caulerpa High Risk Zone
properties.Source: MPI public polygon geometry + legal notice wording
properties.UpdateNote: High Risk Zone (Zone 3) per CAN. October 2025.
properties.NoticeName: Controlled Area Notice: Exotic Caulerpa Te Rawhiti Inlet Bay of Islands 2025
properties.BoundaryMethod: Official public polygon kept; legal notice checked
properties.LegalSummary: High-risk-zone bounded by Whau Point, Te Ao Island, Poroporo Island, and Tokatokahau Point.

properties.Name: Ahuahu - Great Mercury Island
properties.Source: MPI public polygon geometry + legal notice wording
properties.NoticeName: Controlled Area Notice: Exotic Caulerpa Ahuahu Great Mercury Island 2025
properties.BoundaryMethod: Official public polygon kept; legal notice checked
properties.LegalSummary: Marine waters around Ahuahu Great Mercury Island extending to 1 nautical mile around the main island up to and including the high-tide mark.

properties.Name: Aotea - Great Barrier
properties.Description: Controlled Area — yellow zone only. Rebuilt to fit MPI Oct 2025 Aotea map / 40m contour extent, excluding official red high-risk zones.
properties.Source: MPI October 2025 Aotea CAN map image georeferenced to existing coastline; red zones retained from official existing geometry
properties.UpdateNote: Aotea yellow zone rebuilt March 2026 from MPI Oct 2025 CAN leaflet/map and legal notice wording. Main coastline retained from existing dataset.
properties.BoundaryMethod: Outer boundary traced from MPI Oct 2025 Aotea CAN map and georeferenced to existing coastline; inner coastline retained from existing geometry; red zones subtracted from official red polygons.
properties.NoticeName: Controlled Area Notice: Exotic Caulerpa - Aotea Great Barrier Island 2025

properties.Name: Waiheke Island
properties.Source: MPI public polygon geometry + legal notice wording
properties.NoticeName: Controlled Area Notice: Exotic Caulerpa Waiheke Island 2025
properties.BoundaryMethod: Official public polygon kept; legal notice checked
properties.LegalSummary: Marine waters of Onetangi Bay and Thompsons Point, Waiheke Island, up to and including the high-tide mark.

properties.Name: Hauturu Zone
properties.Source: MPI public polygon geometry + legal notice wording
properties.UpdateNote: Controlled Area Notice. Red zone per MPI rules as of March 2026.
properties.NoticeName: Controlled Area Notice: Exotic Caulerpa Hauturu Little Barrier Island 2025
properties.BoundaryMethod: Official public polygon kept; legal notice checked
properties.LegalSummary: Entire controlled area around Te Hauturu-o-Toi / Little Barrier Island is currently a high-risk-zone extending to the 40 m depth contour up to and including the high-tide mark.

properties.Name: Aotea - Great Barrier High Risk Zone (Broken Islands)
properties.Source: Rebuilt from 2025 Aotea legal notice using Aotea controlled-area polygon as sea boundary base
properties.NoticeName: Controlled Area Notice: Exotic Caulerpa - Aotea Great Barrier Island
properties.BoundaryMethod: Clipped to Aotea controlled-area polygon; south of 36°11.200'S and west of 175°19.530'E
properties.Activities: No anchoring without permit. No removal of sea organisms using seafloor contact methods (dredging, trawling, cray potting, flounder nets). Line fishing from un-anchored vessel, spearfishing, and hand-gathering allowed.
properties.Description: High-risk zone with additional restrictions. Anchoring permit required (email caulerpa@mpi.govt.nz). Commenced 1 October 2025. In force until revoked.

properties.Name: Aotea - Great Barrier High Risk Zone (Tryphena)
properties.Source: Rebuilt from 2025 Aotea legal notice using Aotea controlled-area polygon shoreline arcs
properties.NoticeName: Controlled Area Notice: Exotic Caulerpa - Aotea Great Barrier Island
properties.BoundaryMethod: P1→P2 straight line; P2→P3 shoreline; P3→P4→P5→P6 straight lines; P6→P1 shoreline
properties.Activities: No anchoring without permit. No removal of sea organisms using seafloor contact methods (dredging, trawling, cray potting, flounder nets). Line fishing from un-anchored vessel, spearfishing, and hand-gathering allowed.
properties.Description: High-risk zone with additional restrictions. Anchoring permit required (email caulerpa@mpi.govt.nz). Commenced 1 October 2025. In force until revoked.
